title.rendered: 14 Job Boards for Nonprofit Professionals Worldwide

content.rendered:
The U.S. nonprofit job market is tightening primarily due to a loss in federal grants and donors giving less in response to economic instability. Add to that the continued sprawl of AI and automation worldwide and the decline in international aid, 2026 could be a tough year for do-gooders across the globe.

If you are a nonprofit professional in need of new employment, below are 14 of the top nonprofit job boards. To grow your skill set and quickly improve your resume and LinkedIn profile, Nonprofit Tech for Good offers three certificate programs for nonprofit professionals—and when the time comes to negotiate your new salary, learn from Idealist’s Guide to Nonprofit Salaries.

For U.S. Job Seekers

1) Work for Good :: workforgood.org

Since its founding in 1999 as Opportunity Knocks, one of the first job boards focused exclusively on mission-driven careers, Work for Good has helped more than 30,000 purpose-driven organizations find the talent they need.

2) Philanthropy News Digest :: philanthropynewsdigest.org/jobs

PND’s job board provides listings of current full-time job openings at U.S. nonprofits, foundations, and institutions of higher education.

3) National Nonprofits :: nationalnonprofits.org

A nonprofit job board that features management positions with reputable organizations that also offers an extensive set of recruitment tools for nonprofits.

4) National Council of Nonprofits :: careers.councilofnonprofits.org

Founded in 1990, the National Council of Nonprofits is a trusted resource and advocate for America’s charitable nonprofits.

5) LinkedIn :: linkedin.com/jobs/nonprofit-jobs

LinkedIn has an extensive job board that offers filtering of available positions by salary and on-site/remote/hybrid and provides an “Easy Apply” option.

6) Foundation List :: foundationlist.org

Positions posted and recruited for on Foundation List include part-time and full-time employment from executive to entry-level.

7) FlexJobs :: flexjobs.com

Founded in 2007, FlexJobs lists remote and flexible job opportunities in the nonprofit sector.

8) ExecSearches.com :: execsearches.com

The ExecSearches.com job board has been serving the nonprofit community since 1999.

9) Chronicle of Philanthropy :: jobs.philanthropy.com

An extensive job board and career resource center for nonprofit professionals and foundation executives.

For Job Seekers Worldwide

10) Pro Bono Australia :: probonoaustralia.niceboard.co

Pro Bono Australia provides news, jobs, and resources for the common good.

11) Idealist (Worldwide) :: idealist.org

Idealist connect Idealists—people who want to do good—with employment and volunteer opportunities for action all over the world. The website is also available in Portuguese and Spanish.

12) Devex (Worldwide) :: devex.com/jobs

Devex is the media platform and jobs board for the global development community.

13) Charity Village (Canada) :: charityvillage.com

For more than 20 years, CharityVillage has helped thousands of Canadian charities find exceptional talent.

14) CharityJob (United Kingdom):: charityjob.co.uk

CharityJob is the UK’s largest and most specialized job board carrying non-profit, NGO, social enterprise, CIC, and voluntary jobs.

The 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising program provides an honest, balanced approach to using AI for nonprofit marketing and fundraising—and illuminates why AI literacy is a must-have skill for 2026 and onward. Customized for nonprofit professionals, this webinar series will expand your skill set, advance your career, and help transition your nonprofit into the age of AI.

The total cost is $229 USD and the program starts October 21! If you prefer to earn the 2026 Certificate in Artificial Intelligence (AI) for Marketing & Fundraising now rather than wait until October 21, you can buy the recordings from the webinar series presented in January and February 2026 for $189 USD.
